summary: Made two surgical seam edits: re-anchored the opening in the valley's water soundscape instead of the original temporal formula, and tied June's notebook position directly to chapter 17's closing image for smoother entry continuity.
edits: Rewrote the first sentence so the chapter opens on the encroaching water-noises before landing the September time marker.
Added that the cemetery notebook was still lying where June had left it the night before to carry forward the prior chapter's final beat.
